'''Quarren Industrial''' was a company [[Quarren Industrial Headquarters|based]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] that produced various types of mining equipment,<ref name="Strongholds" /> such as the [[Q-4 Borer Droid]] and the [[Quarren mining laser platform]], used by the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] to extract ores from the ocean floor.

{{Company-stub}}
